task: Advanced high-value task: Single-Cell Doublet Detection Sample Expert Review Queue. Scenario: a specialist reviewer found conflicting signals and needs an auditable explanation of which values matter for single-cell doublet detection sample. Embedded packet: Records: R1 expected_doublet_pct=34 detected_doublet_pct=61 median_genes=3; R2 expected_doublet_pct=43 detected_doublet_pct=57 median_genes=6; R3 expected_doublet_pct=29 detected_doublet_pct=72 median_genes=2. Remediation options: O1 changes expected_doublet_pct by -12% cost=72500; O2 changes detected_doublet_pct by -18% cost=91700; O3 changes median_genes by -25% cost=52300; max_budget=116400. Rules and constraints: detected>1.8x expected suggests overcall; detected<0.6x expected suggests undercall; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: design the output schema and acceptance checks an automated agent would need to reproduce the analysis. Deliver single_cell_doublet_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
